taskHints.idleShare: Broaden valid actions or make the fallback state more expressive.
taskHints.restShare: Lower passive stat pressure or raise active-recovery rewards.
taskHints.moveShare: Make movement cheaper, clearer, or more rewarding in early turns.
taskHints.meaningfulChoiceDensity: Add more valid alternatives per state and expose why they matter.
taskHints.boringTurns: Add earlier discovery, pressure, card feedback, or board-state deltas.
taskHints.invalidAttempts: Tune strategy heuristics or improve action-validity affordances.
taskHints.revealedZones: Improve exploration incentives and reachable tile generation.
taskHints.zeroStatPlayers: Reduce stat collapse or introduce better rescue/recovery loops.
taskHints.artifacts: Increase dig payoff clarity or route players toward artifact opportunities.
taskHints.spikeTurns: Increase volatility for this scenario through events, cards, or risk rewards.
